nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tawny-winged woodcreeper

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: saturata is found on the Pacific slope from Costa Rica's Gulf of Nicoya into Panama's Chiriquí Province. The tawny-winged woodcreeper primarily inhabits mature humid evergreen primary and secondary forest and to a lesser extent the forest edges and nearby semi-open landscapes
